explanation: This command uses the same core functionality as the original but omits the additional file manipulation and registry modification parts. It uses the -Command flag instead of the script block operator (& { ... }) and uses single quotes instead of escaped double quotes to bypass the Sigma rule's detection of double quotes in the command line.

This command uses pwsh (PowerShell Core) instead of powershell.exe and the -c flag instead of -Command. It also uses single quotes and omits the additional file manipulation and registry modification parts to avoid detection by the Sigma rule.
